related_requirements.requirement: Volere 15c. Privacy Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Traefik acts as a reverse proxy that enforces HTTPS on port 443, redirecting HTTP traffic from port 80 to ensure secure communication and protect data integrity and confidentiality.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 12e. Robustness or Fault Tolerance Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Traefik functions as a load balancer, distributing traffic between multiple service instances to improve availability and response capacity, supporting the 99.9% uptime goal.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 14c. Adaptability Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Traefik routes incoming requests to the internal System Service based on defined rules, ensuring the application is accessible regardless of the entry point configuration.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be available in both Spanish and English.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service implements internationalization using the 'next-intl' library and dynamic routing ([lang]) to serve content in different languages.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 11a. Ease of Use Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: The interface is built using React components and libraries like Radix-ui to create intuitive, accessible, and easy-to-use UI elements for non-technical users.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow registering new users.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service provides registration screens and logic (using Auth.js/Next-auth) to create accounts for donors and companies.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must authenticate existing users via email.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service integrates with Google OAuth and MagicLink functionality via Auth.js to handle user authentication securely.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow logged-in users to view company profiles and products.
related_requirements.explanation: Server Components in Next.js fetch data from the database to render public profiles and product lists accessible to all users.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must be able to modify its public profile/page at any time.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service provides edit forms and server actions to update company profile data stored in the database.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must have access to the system dashboard.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service renders a dedicated dashboard page displaying statistics, profile completion, and navigation to internal functionalities.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must be able to register a product visible on its public profile.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service includes product creation/editing screens where companies input product details which are then saved and displayed.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must be able to register a route to link to its products.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service provides route management screens allowing companies to define reception channels, market zones, and points.

related_requirements.requirement: A user must be able to return a product via its routes.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service implements a return flow popup where donors select routes and initiate the return process.

related_requirements.requirement: Every route must have an associated budget which the user can pay via the system.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service integrates payment processing logic to handle route budgets during the product return flow.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must have an affiliation/plan system for companies (free, basic, premium).
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service includes plan selection interfaces and integrates with Stripe to manage subscriptions and payments.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 15a. Access Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Server Actions and middleware enforce access control, ensuring only authorized company users can edit their own products, routes, and profiles.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must save all images of all products/users.
related_requirements.explanation: While images are stored in S3, the Data Service stores the metadata and links (URLs) associated with these images in the 'images' and 'uploaded_products' tables.

related_requirements.requirement: Store User, Company, Product, and Route data.
related_requirements.explanation: The relational database structure (users, companies, products, routes tables) persists all core entity data required for the system's operation.

related_requirements.requirement: Maintain data integrity and relationships.
related_requirements.explanation: Foreign keys and cascading deletes defined in the schema ensure referential integrity between users, companies, products, and returns.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 14a. Maintenance Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Prisma simplifies database interaction with a typed API and migration tools, making the system easier to maintain and update with clear documentation.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 12g. Expansion or Growth Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Prisma supports scalable database queries and works with PostgreSQL, facilitating the handling of increased data volume as the system grows.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must authenticate existing users via email.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service utilizes Google OAuth to provide a direct authentication method alongside MagicLink for user login.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must save all images of all products/users.
related_requirements.explanation: The System Service uses the AWS SDK to upload and retrieve image files from Amazon S3 buckets for cloud storage.

related_requirements.requirement: Every route must have an associated budget which the user can pay via the system.
related_requirements.explanation: Stripe is integrated into the System Service to process payments for route budgets during product returns.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must have an affiliation/plan system for companies.
related_requirements.explanation: Stripe handles the subscription logic and payments when companies change plans (free, basic, premium).

related_requirements.requirement: The system must authenticate existing users via email.
related_requirements.explanation: Brevo is connected to send MagicLinks and other transactional emails required for user registration and login processes.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 14a. Maintenance Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Sentry tracks and manages errors in the application, helping developers identify and resolve issues quickly to reduce maintenance time.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 12e. Robustness or Fault Tolerance Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Services run in isolated Docker containers managed by Docker Compose, allowing for easier recovery and restart in case of failures.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 12g. Expansion or Growth Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Docker allows scaling resources by increasing container instances or server capacity while maintaining performance under increased load.

related_requirements.requirement: Volere 14a. Maintenance Requirements
related_requirements.explanation: Containerization ensures consistent environments across development and production, reducing maintenance costs and complexity.
